publishedAbstract: * ODF Block and File StorageClasses are missing * ODF Block and File CSI driver pods are missing * The `$ oc get clusterversion` output shows one or more Cluster Operators degraded * The StorageClient resource is in phase `Initializing` * The StorageConsumer resource is not `Connected` * The ocs-client-operator-controller-manager logs are reporting the following error: ~~~ "unable to find the updated cluster version" ~~~
publishedTitle: Failed Insights Cluster Operator blocks Openshift Data Foundation (ODF) CSI Drivers/StorageClass creation on a New Install - ocs-client-operator-controller-manager "error": "unable to find the updated cluster version"
